parents.subject: LU-16107 wbc: more tests about cache evicting under WBC

commit.subject: LU-16107 wbc: close() after client eviction under WBC
commit.message:
LU-16107 wbc: close() after client eviction under WBC

This patch handles the close() after client eviction under WBC.
During the client eviction, all cached files under WBC will be
invalidated. And the dentry for the files keeping opened will be
released in the close() after client eviction.

Signed-off-by: Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Idf08518dda3810d620ab012cee86c3e92416d6aa
